name: rspack-cjs-interop-bug
description: Minimal repro: no import pattern works for both ESM and CJS output when external CJS module uses _export() pattern with __esModule but no exports.default

scripts.build:lib: cd fake-cjs-lib && npx swc src/index.ts -o index.js
scripts.test: pnpm build && pnpm test:esm && pnpm test:cjs
